# Full: src/auth/token_store.py
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from datetime import datetime
from typing import Optional

@dataclass
class TokenPair:
    access_token: str
    refresh_token: str
    expires_at: datetime
    scopes: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)

@dataclass
class TokenClaims:
    subject: str
    issuer: str
    audience: list[str]
    expires_at: datetime
    scopes: list[str]
